category_sources: source_facts.description: Compiler for the C3 language.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is c3c; official GitHub repository title describes c3c as the compiler for C3.
docs_sources: Official c3c repository README points to the C3 manual at c3-lang.org; source_facts.homepage is the official repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a language compiler; source_facts.executables lists c3c.
